emerge_agent_suite.description: Specialized AI agents for EMERGE combat system development

agents.name: emerge-orchestrator
agents.description: EMERGE workflow coordinator and development lifecycle manager. Manages the entire agent suite, coordinating workflows and enforcing quality gates.
examples: Create a complete new module with tests
Debug and fix a complex issue

agents.name: emerge-expert
agents.description: EMERGE system architecture expert for validation and guidance. Reviews code for architectural compliance, suggests improvements, and ensures consistency with EMERGE principles.
examples: Review this module for EMERGE compliance
Check if my event patterns are correct

agents.name: emerge-coder
agents.description: EMERGE system code generator and implementation specialist. Creates new modules, refactors existing code, and implements complex combat logic following EMERGE patterns.
examples: Create a new affliction tracking module
Refactor this code to use events

agents.name: emerge-tester
agents.description: Automated testing and validation specialist for EMERGE. Generates comprehensive test suites, simulates combat scenarios, and validates module interactions.
examples: Generate tests for the curing module

agents.name: emerge-migrator
agents.description: Migration and upgrade specialist for EMERGE. Converts existing combat systems (SVOF, Legacy) to EMERGE architecture and handles version upgrades.
examples: Migrate my SVOF system to EMERGE
Upgrade EMERGE from v1.0 to v2.0
Create compatibility layer for legacy code

agents.name: emerge-debugger
agents.description: Runtime debugging and diagnostics specialist for EMERGE. Traces event flows, profiles performance, and diagnoses complex issues in the event-driven system.

workflow: Use emerge-orchestrator for complex multi-step tasks
Use emerge-expert to validate architecture before starting
Use emerge-coder to generate new modules or refactor code
Use emerge-tester to create and run tests
best_practices: Always validate with emerge-expert before committing
Generate tests with emerge-tester for new features
Profile with emerge-debugger for performance issues
Use emerge-coder for consistent code generation
Leverage emerge-migrator for legacy code updates

new_module: Task: emerge-coder 'Create a new stance tracking module'
Task: emerge-tester 'Generate tests for stance module'
debugging_session: Task: emerge-debugger 'Trace event flow for curing'
